access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses abstract-level results for this baseline pass.

name: Tadalafil improves lean mass and endothelial function in nonobese men with mild ED/LUTS: in vivo and in vitro characterization.
summary: Randomized study in 43 nonobese men with mild erectile dysfunction and/or lower urinary tract symptoms comparing tadalafil 5 mg once daily with 20 mg on demand for 2 months, using DXA body composition as a primary outcome and in vitro skeletal muscle cell assays as mechanistic follow-up.
